task_completion.description: Create a new style named 'scaled_cities' in the 'ne' workspace.
task_completion.visual_evidence: GeoServer 'Styles' page showing 'scaled_cities' in the list of styles, or the 'New Style'/'Edit Style' page showing the name 'scaled_cities' and workspace 'ne'.

task_completion.description: Configure a red circle point marker to render at all scales.
task_completion.visual_evidence: SLD XML code in the style editor showing a <PointSymbolizer> with a <Mark> containing <WellKnownName>circle</WellKnownName> and a red fill color (e.g., #FF0000). This symbolizer should not be restricted by a MaxScaleDenominator.

task_completion.description: Configure the label to display the 'name' property using a black SansSerif font with a white halo.
task_completion.visual_evidence: SLD XML code showing a <TextSymbolizer> with a <Label> containing <PropertyName>name</PropertyName>, a <Font> specifying SansSerif (and black color), and a <Halo> with a white fill (#FFFFFF).

task_completion.description: Restrict the label to only show when the scale denominator is less than 20,000,000.
task_completion.visual_evidence: SLD XML code showing a <MaxScaleDenominator> tag with a value between 15000000 and 25000000. This tag must be inside the <Rule> that contains the <TextSymbolizer> for the label.

task_completion.description: Assign 'scaled_cities' as the default style for the 'ne:ne_populated_places' layer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: GeoServer 'Edit Layer' page for 'ne_populated_places', under the 'Publishing' tab, showing 'scaled_cities' selected in the 'Default Style' dropdown menu.

integrity.description: The agent used the GeoServer web interface to create the style and assign it to the layer.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent navigating the GeoServer web administration interface in a browser, rather than using terminal curl commands or directly editing configuration files.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely edited or pasted the SLD XML code into the GeoServer style editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the SLD XML code present in the GeoServer style editor text area.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the UI by writing scripts to modify GeoServer's internal data directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows showing python scripts or bash commands directly modifying files in the geoserver/data_dir/workspaces/ne directory.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target style name: 'scaled_cities'. Target workspace: 'ne'. Target layer: 'ne:ne_populated_places'. The style must include a PointSymbolizer with a red circle marker that applies at all scales. The style must also include a TextSymbolizer for the 'name' property with a black SansSerif font and a white halo. The TextSymbolizer must be constrained by a MaxScaleDenominator of 20,000,000 (values between 15,000,000 and 25,000,000 are acceptable). Finally, the 'scaled_cities' style must be set as the default style for the 'ne_populated_places' layer.
